hooks.description: Remind about .po file validation when a translation file is created or modified

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] Translation (.po) file changed. Verify:
- msgstr entries do not have extra newlines or mismatched plural forms
- Run /i18n-validate to check for syntax errors and encoding issues
- Run /i18n-missing to find untranslated entries by language
- Load into Odoo: python -m odoo -c conf/project.conf -d db -u module --stop-after-init

hooks.description: Remind about generating language .po files when a .pot template is created

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] Translation template (.pot) created. Next steps:
- Copy to language file: cp module/i18n/module.pot module/i18n/ar.po
- Update 'Language' header in the .po file (e.g. ar_AE)
- Run /i18n-extract to regenerate from source if strings have changed
- Use /i18n-missing to compare coverage across languages

hooks.description: Remind about _() and _lt() usage when a new Python model file is created

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] New model file created. i18n reminders:
- Use _() for runtime strings: raise ValidationError(_("Invalid value"))
- Use _lt() for class-level strings: selection=[('draft', _lt('Draft'))]
- Do NOT wrap string= attributes in _(): string='My Field' is auto-translated
- Run /i18n-extract after adding strings to update .po files

hooks.description: Remind about XML translation attributes when a view file is created

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] New view file created. Translation reminders:
- string= attributes on <field> elements are auto-translated
- Text nodes in templates are translatable by default
- Use t-translation="off" to exclude technical/code content from extraction
- Run /i18n-extract to update .po files with new strings

hooks.description: Remind about _t() import for JavaScript i18n when a JS file is created
Remind about RTL CSS patterns when a new SCSS file is created in a theme

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] New SCSS file created. RTL support reminders:
- Use [dir="rtl"] selectors for RTL overrides: [dir="rtl"] .my-class { text-align: right; }
- Prefer CSS logical properties: margin-inline-start over margin-left
- Use logical shorthands: border-inline, padding-block, inset-inline
- Test layout with Arabic in Odoo: Settings > Languages > Arabic

hooks.description: Remind to create the i18n/ directory when a new module manifest is created

action.message:
[odoo-i18n] New module manifest created. Translation setup:
- Create i18n/ directory: mkdir -p module_name/i18n/
- Odoo auto-reads .po files from i18n/ on install/update (no manifest entry needed)
- Run /i18n-extract to generate the initial .pot template
- Add languages: copy .pot to ar.po, fr.po, etc. and translate
